feed.title: MAYTENSOR
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive and feature-rich Jekyll theme for technical writing.

entry.title: Blackbody radiation
entry.summary: Intro Black-body radiation is the thermal electromagnetic radiation within, or surrounding, a body in thermodynamic equilibrium with its environment, emitted by a black body (an idealized opaque, non-reflective body). It has a specific, continuous spectrum of wavelengths, inversely related to intensity, that depend only on the body’s temperature, which is assumed, for the sake of calculations a...
